description: "A transient daily note with no links; excluded from the orphan list by config."
tags: [fixture]
---

# 2026-07-01

A daily scratch note. It has no links in either direction, so it is degree-0 like an orphan, but
because it lives under the transient `daily/` prefix the config excludes it from the orphan list.
It still counts as a note (and toward the raw degree-0 tally in stats), proving transient_prefixes
affects only the orphan list, not the note census.
